channel.title: Professional Networking Portfolio on V31dt | IT Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Professional Networking Portfolio on V31dt | IT Portfolio

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am an Applied Computer Science student using this portfolio to document my growth as a future IT professional.

This site focuses on the professional networking activities, projects, technical interests, and reflections that show how I approach lifelong learning. It is also meant to be useful beyond the course: a compact overview of who I am, what I am learning, and where I want to grow.

Focus areas

  • Software development
  • Cybersecurity and ethical hacking
  • Artificial intelligence and automation
  • Professional communication and networking
  • Practical projects with real users or realistic constraints

Links

  • GitHub: github.com/v31dt
  • LinkedIn: add your LinkedIn URL here
  • CV: add a link to your CV PDF here

item.title: How I Built This Portfolio
item.description:
This portfolio is built with Hugo, a static site generator. I chose Hugo because it keeps the portfolio simple, fast, and easy to maintain. Each article is written as a Markdown file, and Hugo converts those files into a static website.

The visual theme is Archie, a minimal Hugo theme. I selected it because it keeps the focus on the content: reflections, projects, and proof of professional development.

The source code is hosted in the GitHub repository v31dt/v31dt.github.io. GitHub Pages publishes the repository from the main branch. The generated Hugo output is committed in the repository root so the current GitHub Pages configuration can serve the website directly.

item.title: Professional Networking Checklist
item.description:
This page tracks the required portfolio items for the Professional Networking module.

Required items

  • Portfolio website available through a public URL
  • About page that clearly identifies who owns the portfolio
  • Blog post explaining how the website was created
  • Four physical event reflections with proof of attendance
  • Hackathon reflection with proof of participation
  • Podcast episode with an external IT expert
  • LinkedIn profile URL, PDF export, and reflection
  • TI on STAGE pitch material and reflection
  • Final PDF version of the website for submission

Current status

Requirement Status Notes
Portfolio website Done Hugo site hosted through GitHub Pages
About page In progress Replace placeholder text with personal details
Website creation post Done Explains Hugo, Archie, GitHub, and the publishing workflow
Event 1 To complete Add event details and proof
Event 2 To complete Add event details and proof
Event 3 To complete Add event details and proof
Event 4 To complete Add event details and proof
Hackathon To complete Add reflection and proof
Podcast To complete Add title, guest, topic, and link
LinkedIn To complete Add profile URL and reflection
TI on STAGE To complete Add pitch material and reflection
